name: BrasilAPI
tagline: Open, community-run API for Brazilian public data
description: Query Brazilian postal codes, company registrations, banks, area codes, exchange rates, vehicle prices, national holidays, IBGE geographic data, ISBN lookups, customs codes, PIX participants, interest rates, and domain availability — all from a single free, no-auth public API maintained by the Brazilian developer community.

tools.name: get_cep
tools.description: Look up a Brazilian postal code (CEP): returns state, city, neighborhood, street, and geographic coordinates.

tools.name: get_cnpj
tools.description: Look up a Brazilian company (CNPJ): returns legal name, trade name, address, status, and registered activities from Receita Federal.

tools.name: list_banks
tools.description: List every Brazilian bank registered with the Central Bank, with its COMPE code, ISPB code, and full name.

tools.name: get_bank
tools.description: Look up a single Brazilian bank by its COMPE code (e.g. 1 for Banco do Brasil, 341 for Itaú).

tools.name: get_ddd
tools.description: Look up the state and list of cities served by a Brazilian telephone area code (DDD).

tools.name: list_moedas
tools.description: List the currency codes accepted by the exchange rate (câmbio) endpoint.

tools.name: get_cambio_cotacao
tools.description: Get the BRL exchange rate (buy/sell) for a foreign currency on a specific past business day. Cannot query today's date, future dates, or dates before 1984-11-28.

params.name: moeda
params.description: Currency code, from list_moedas (e.g. USD, EUR)

params.name: data
params.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format; must be a past business day

tools.name: list_feriados
tools.description: List Brazil's national holidays (date and name) for a given year.

tools.name: list_fipe_marcas
tools.description: List vehicle makers (brands) recognized by the FIPE price table for a vehicle type.

params.name: tabela_referencia
params.description: Optional FIPE reference table code; defaults to the current table

tools.name: get_fipe_preco
tools.description: Get the FIPE reference price history for a specific vehicle by its FIPE code.

params.name: tabela_referencia
params.description: Optional FIPE reference table code; defaults to the current table

tools.name: list_ibge_uf
tools.description: List all 27 Brazilian states (UFs) with their IBGE code, name, initials, and region.

tools.name: list_ibge_municipios
tools.description: List every municipality (city) in a Brazilian state, with its IBGE code and name.

params.name: providers
params.description: Optional comma-separated data source preference: dados-abertos-br, gov, wikipedia

tools.name: get_isbn
tools.description: Look up a book by its ISBN: returns title, authors, publisher, and cover image from Brazilian and international catalogs.

params.name: isbn
params.description: ISBN-10 or ISBN-13, with or without hyphens

params.name: providers
params.description: Optional comma-separated provider preference: cbl, google-books, mercado-editorial, open-library

tools.name: get_ncm
tools.description: Look up a Mercosur customs classification code (NCM): returns its description and tax rates.

tools.name: list_pix_participants
tools.description: List every financial institution participating in Brazil's PIX instant payment system, with its ISPB code.

tools.name: list_taxas
tools.description: List Brazil's key benchmark interest/inflation rates (SELIC, CDI, IPCA) with their current values.

tools.name: get_taxa
tools.description: Get the current value of a single Brazilian benchmark rate.

tools.name: check_dominio_registrobr
tools.description: Check whether a .br domain name is available for registration, taken, or in another status with Registro.br.

params.name: domain
params.description: Domain name to check, without the .br suffix (e.g. meusite)
